title: Summary: Turn 873
content: KnowledgeBase project (Maven, Java 8, Jackson, H2) snapshot at Turn 873: completed Phase 1 (added `category` to `Notion`, `notionCategoryPrompt` to `InferenceConfig`, new `NotionCategoryInferenceService` with LLM and noop implementations) but not yet integrated into pipeline; Phase 2 integration and exposure via `KnowledgeBaseService`/`KnowledgeMapService`/`KnowledgeMapHttpServer` pending.
